description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a dark blue exterior, prominently featuring the Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue on the front. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and a silver pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. Nutritional information, barcodes, and branding details are printed on the back in white text. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents or scratches. The overall design is typical of a carbonated soft drink container found in urban environments.
description: A glossy, dark blue aluminum Pepsi can with a silver pull-tab and prominent branding. The surface is smooth and undamaged, with detailed labeling and a sleek finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Pepsi logo and vertical 'pepsi' text on a dark blue background.
description_view_1: Back view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and additional branding details in white text.
description_view_2: Side view with the Pepsi logo partially visible and minimal text, emphasizing the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side with mostly plain blue surface and a small portion of the logo and text visible near the edge.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue; 'pepsi' text in white; nutritional information, barcode, and branding details in white on the back.
